expectedIssues: BetRivers Exclusive Games badge shows 0 games
reportedIssues: Several horizontal sections are clipped at the right edge, including the top category tabs and the game tiles. The 'Hot Games' tab and multiple game cards are only partially visible, which can look broken if this is not an intentional carousel behavior.
The fixed bottom navigation appears to overlap the game content. The lower game tiles are partially hidden behind the bottom nav bar.
The 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' section shows a badge reading '0 Games' even though multiple game tiles are displayed underneath it.
Some game thumbnails and labels on the right side are cut off, making titles like 'Magnificent Phoenix' and other right-column games unreadable.
Some header partner logos are very small and difficult to read on mobile.

expected.reasoning: Issue 2 directly describes the 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' badge showing '0 Games' despite game tiles being present below it.
